name: LendNation
description_short: LendNation St Francis, Wisconsin — LendNation offers payday loans, title loans, and installment loans at 200+ locations across 11 states, with instant d...
description_long:
LendNation is a multi-state consumer lending chain with over 200 physical store locations operating across 11 states. The company has been in the short-term lending business for decades — its San Antonio Bandera Road location, for example, has been open since 2005. LendNation positions itself not just as a loan provider but as a customer-service-first operation, with stated values around treating customers with respect. Customers can apply in-store or online, and the company maintains a national customer service line at 866-324-9565 alongside local branch numbers.

LendNation's core product is the payday loan — a short-term cash advance typically between $100 and $1,000 that is repaid on or around the borrower's next payday. Beyond that, the company offers multi-pay installment loans with repayment terms extending up to 36 months, with payment schedules that can be bi-weekly, semi-monthly, or monthly. Title loans are another major product line: borrowers use a free-and-clear vehicle title as collateral to access larger loan amounts over longer repayment periods, while retaining the ability to keep driving their vehicle. Eligible vehicles include cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, and RVs, depending on state. Supporting services include check cashing, Insight Mobile Banking prepaid cards, direct deposit, and instant debit card funding.

Several features distinguish LendNation from single-location competitors. The breadth of its network — 200-plus stores in 11 states — means consistent product availability and established local presence in many markets. The instant debit card funding option allows borrowers to receive cash without waiting for a bank transfer, which is a meaningful differentiator for same-day emergencies. The San Antonio location carries a 4.8-out-of-5 Google rating based on 161 reviews, suggesting strong local customer satisfaction. Online applications are available alongside in-store service, giving borrowers flexibility in how they engage.

LendNation serves a real need for consumers who cannot access traditional bank credit quickly, but prospective borrowers should approach with clear eyes. The website does not disclose APRs or fee structures — standard practice in this industry but a meaningful gap for comparison shopping. Payday loans, by design, are expensive short-term instruments; the multi-pay installment products carry lower per-payment costs but extend the debt relationship. Title loans introduce collateral risk: defaulting could mean losing a vehicle. LendNation is a legitimate, established lender in this segment, but it is best treated as a last-resort emergency tool rather than a routine financial solution.
address: 2320 E Layton Ave, St Francis, WI 53235

company_info.headquarters: 2320 E Layton Ave, St Francis, WI 53235

pros: Instant debit card funding for same-day cash access
Multiple loan types available: payday, multi-pay installment (up to 36 months), and title loans
200+ physical locations across 11 states with long-established local branches
Online and in-store application options with stated instant decision on pre-approval
4.8/5 Google rating from 161 reviews at the San Antonio Bandera Road location
Title loan borrowers keep driving their vehicle during the loan term
Check cashing and Insight Mobile Banking cards available for unbanked consumers
cons: No APR, fee schedules, or rate ranges disclosed on the website — makes cost comparison impossible before applying
Title loans require free-and-clear vehicle title as collateral — default risk includes repossession
Product availability varies by state — not all loan types or online access offered everywhere
Payday loans are due on or around next payday, creating rollover risk for borrowers who cannot repay in full
Presence limited to 11 states — unavailable to most of the US
best_for: Consumers needing $100–$1,000 fast cash before their next payday with limited credit alternatives
Vehicle owners with a free-and-clear title who need a larger loan amount with structured repayments
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who also need check cashing or prepaid banking services
Borrowers in one of LendNation's 11 operating states who prefer face-to-face service at a physical branch
diagnosis: LendNation is best suited for consumers facing a genuine short-term cash shortage who lack access to bank credit or credit cards and need funds the same day. The main caveat is cost opacity — LendNation does not publish rates online, payday loans carry industry-typical high APRs, and title loans put a vehicle at risk if the borrower defaults; it should be used only as a last resort for true emergencies.
services: Payday loans (cash advances, $100–$1,000, due next payday)
Multi-pay installment loans (up to 36-month terms, bi-weekly/semi-monthly/monthly payments)
Title loans (vehicle-secured, longer terms, structured payments)
In-store and online loan applications with instant pre-approval decision
